faqs.question: How much does centipede control cost in Merrick?
faqs.answer: Our centipede control services in Merrick range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment requirements. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, ensuring transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Why do I have so many centipedes in my Merrick home?
faqs.answer: Centipedes are attracted to moisture and often enter Merrick homes through cracks in foundations, basement windows, or gaps around doors. Long Island's humid climate and Merrick's proximity to water sources make local homes particularly susceptible. They feed on other insects, so their presence may also indicate additional pest issues.

faqs.question: Are centipedes in Merrick dangerous?
faqs.answer: While house centipedes can deliver a painful bite if handled, they are generally not dangerous to humans or pets. However, their presence is unsettling and often indicates excess moisture or other pest problems in your home. Professional treatment addresses both the centipedes and underlying conditions attracting them.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate centipedes from my Merrick property?
faqs.answer: Most customers see significant reduction in centipede activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 1-2 weeks as our treatments target both existing centipedes and their food sources. We offer follow-up visits to ensure long-term results and can schedule same-day or next-day service for Merrick residents.
